parameters.name: time_range
parameters.value: ={"since":"{{ $('Code prepara datas para extracao').item.json.date_start }}","until":"{{ $('Code prepara datas para extracao').item.json.date_end }}"}

parameters.content:
## Step 1: Trigger & Report Type Detection
Scheduled triggers decide whether the workflow runs weekly or monthly and set flags used throughout the workflow.

## Step 2: Website & Ads Data Processing
Loops through each website, fetches analytics and ad data, filters campaigns, merges sources, and calculates performance KPIs.

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: =SELECT search_term_view.search_term, search_term_view.status, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.all_conversions, metrics.conversions, campaign.name, ad_group.name, ad_group.id, segments.date FROM search_term_view WHERE campaign.id = {{ $('Set dados').item.json.id_google_campanha }} AND segments.date BETWEEN '{{ DateTime.now().setZone('America/Sao_Paulo').minus({ days: 14 }).toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}' AND '{{ DateTime.now().setZone('America/Sao_Paulo').minus({ days: 1 }).toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}' AND metrics.clicks > 1 ORDER BY metrics.clicks DESC LIMIT 1000

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: =SELECT ad_group.id, ad_group.name, ad_group.status, ad_group.type, campaign.id, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value, segments.date FROM ad_group WHERE campaign.id = {{ $('Set dados').item.json.id_google_campanha }} AND segments.date BETWEEN '{{ $('Code prepara datas para extracao').item.json.date_start }}' AND '{{ $('Code prepara datas para extracao').item.json.date_end }}'

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: =SELECT ad_group_ad.ad.id, ad_group_ad.ad.name, ad_group_ad.ad.type, ad_group_ad.status, ad_group_ad.ad.final_urls, ad_group_ad.ad.responsive_search_ad.headlines, ad_group_ad.ad.responsive_search_ad.descriptions, ad_group.id, ad_group.name, campaign.id, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value, segments.date FROM ad_group_ad WHERE ad_group_ad.ad.id = {{ $json.ad_id_google }} AND segments.date BETWEEN '{{ $('Code prepara datas para extracao').item.json.date_start }}' AND '{{ $('Code prepara datas para extracao').item.json.date_end }}'

nodes.name: Google Ads Anúncios (GAQL)
nodes.notes: Nível anúncio — onde tudo acontece: criativo (tipo), copy (headlines/descriptions), destino (final_urls). Público vem do nível conjunto.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "dateRanges": [{ "startDate": "{{ $('Code prepara datas para extracao').item.json.date_start }}", "endDate": "{{ $('Code prepara datas para extracao').item.json.date_end }}" }],
  "dimensions": [{ "name": "sessionDefaultChannelGroup" }, { "name": "date" }],
  "metrics": [{ "name": "sessions" }, { "name": "engagedSessions" }, { "name": "engagementRate" }, { "name": "totalUsers" }, { "name": "keyEvents" }],
  "dimensionFilter": { "filter": { "fieldName": "sessionDefaultChannelGroup", "inListFilter": { "values": ["Organic Search", "Organic Social", "Organic Video", "Organic Shopping"] } } },
  "limit": 10000
}

nodes.name: HTTP Request GA4 Orgânico
nodes.notes: Orgânico do domínio principal (canais Organic), via GA4 Data API runReport.

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  client_id,
  campaign_id,
  date AS business_date,
  SUM(impressions) AS impressions,
  SUM(clicks) AS clicks,
  SUM(cost) AS cost,
  SUM(conversions) AS conversions,
  SUM(revenue) AS conv_value,
  ANY_VALUE(data_source) AS data_source,
  ANY_VALUE(platform) AS platform,
  ANY_VALUE(primary_metric_goal) AS primary_metric_goal,
  ANY_VALUE(execution_id) AS daily_entry_execution_id
FROM `phi_prod.raw_campaign_data`
WHERE client_id = @client_id
  AND date BETWEEN @start_date AND @end_date
GROUP BY client_id, campaign_id, date
